{{- /* Resolve a primary-language page to the current language. Given a page (in the primary/default language), returns a dict: page - the current-language translation if it exists, else the input page itself (a fallback to the primary language) fallback - true when no current-language translation exists Used so navigation can list the full set of pages in every language, linking untranslated ones to the primary-language version. */ -}} {{- $cur := site.Language.Lang -}} {{- $page := . -}} {{- $resolved := $page -}} {{- $fallback := true -}} {{- range $page.AllTranslations -}} {{- if eq .Language.Lang $cur -}} {{- $resolved = . -}} {{- $fallback = false -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- return (dict "page" $resolved "fallback" $fallback) -}}
